title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
Senior AI Engineer

Doctronic | New York City ONSITE (Hybrid) | Reports to CEO

The Mission

Let's make healthcare free and accessible to everyone
through AI. We're building an AI doctor that already handles
millions of consultations - our goal is to scale this to
billions while maintaining medical safety and accuracy.

What You'll Build

Core AI Systems

- Multi-agent consensus architectures where specialized models
  debate cases before conclusions
- RAG pipelines processing thousands of clinical guidelines
  built for LLM consumption
- Fine tuning and model distillation to support efficient
  performance
- Real-time inference systems handling millions of medical
  consultations each month
- Custom workflows for domain-specific medical reasoning

Clinical Data Infrastructure

- NLP pipelines extracting structured data from patient
  conversations (HIPAA-compliant)
- QHIN integrations for automated EHR data retrieval and
  reconciliation
- Intelligent triage systems routing between AI and human
  providers
- Documentation generation matching provider-specific
  protocols

Safety & Scale

- Emergency detection with sub-second escalation to human
  oversight
- Validation layers ensuring 99%+ treatment plan accuracy
- Distributed systems handling rapid growth and peak loads
- Fail-safe mechanisms for critical path decisions in
  regulated environments

You'll also work on voice/video AI interfaces, multilingual
medical NLP, predictive health modeling, and infrastructure
for the next billion patient interactions.

How We Work

- Engineering-first org: no project managers, just senior
  engineers
- Flat structure with direct CEO reporting and high autonomy
- Own features end-to-end from minimal specs to production
- AI coding tools encouraged
- Ship fast with good judgment; daily standups for alignment,
  not micromanagement

Required Qualifications

Education & Background

- CS degree OR equivalent demonstrated expertise
- Hard science degrees (Physics, Math, Engineering) welcomed
  with strong technical foundation
- Preference for graduates from top programs at top
  universities
- Preference for founders, founding engineers, or extensive
  startup experience
- Independent problem solver who collaborates well cross-
  functionally

Technical Expertise

- 7+ years engineering with LLM and generative AI expertise
- Deep knowledge of OpenAI GPT, Anthropic Claude, Meta LLaMA,
  and foundation models
- Production AI systems with real-time inference requirements
- Python, TensorFlow/PyTorch, modern AI frameworks
- Prompt engineering, fine-tuning, model optimization for
  specialized domains

Preferred Qualifications

- AI systems for healthcare, medical, or life sciences
  applications
- Medical terminology, clinical workflows, healthcare data
  standards (HL7, FHIR)
- Medical AI safety, bias detection, fairness in healthcare
- NLP for domain-specific applications
- Work with medical professionals or regulated healthcare
  environments
- Published research in AI/ML, especially healthcare or
  safety-critical applications
- Seed/Series A experience in AI or healthcare
- Advanced degree in CS, AI/ML, or related field

What We Offer

- Competitive salary plus significant equity
- Build AI systems transforming healthcare for millions
- Direct CEO reporting with significant autonomy
- Access to leading AI technologies and medical experts
- Benefits reimbursement

Funding & Momentum

- Union Square Ventures led our seed (Feb 2025)
- Lightspeed Venture Partners preempted our Series A six
  months later (Aug 2025)
- Significant equity stake in fast-moving, well-backed company

About Doctronic

Doctronic is the #1 AI Doctor, revolutionizing direct-to-
patient healthcare through our proprietary AI system.
Doctronic is the first AI legally authorized to practice
medicine. We're processing millions of consultations monthly
with 99%+ treatment plan accuracy validated by board-
certified clinicians. Our platform (doctronic.ai) provides
free, anonymous, HIPAA-compliant AI consultations alongside
affordable human physician visits ($40) available 24/7
across all 50 states via instant video, scheduled video, or
async text.
responsibilities: Build multi-agent consensus architectures with specialized models debating cases before conclusions
Develop RAG pipelines processing thousands of clinical guidelines for LLM consumption
Fine-tune and distill models for efficient performance in medical applications
Implement real-time inference systems handling millions of medical consultations monthly
Create NLP pipelines extracting structured data from patient conversations with HIPAA compliance
Build emergency detection and validation layers ensuring 99%+ treatment plan accuracy

Multi-agent consensus system for medical case review and decision accuracy
Intelligent triage routing between AI and human healthcare providers
Automated clinical documentation generation matching provider-specific protocols
Real-time emergency detection with sub-second escalation to human oversight
Multilingual medical NLP for accessible healthcare across diverse populations
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building multi-agent consensus
architectures, RAG pipelines, fine-tuning models, and real-
time inference systems. The engineer works directly with
LLMs (GPT, Claude, LLaMA), handles model optimization, and
deploys AI systems for medical consultations.
